name: git-ops
description: READ-ONLY agent for safe git operations: commit (conventional format), push, pull, fetch, merge, rebase, branch, tag, stash, revert, cherry-pick, status, log, diff. Triggers on: git commit, git push, git pull, merge, rebase, branch, tag, stash, revert, cherry-pick, คอมมิต, พุช, เมิร์จ, เช็คเอาต์, รี
